# Almog Studio

> Almog is a landscape artist and outdoor designer based in Israel. He composes high-end private gardens, rooftops and outdoor spaces — honest places made of stone, green and light. His practice is rooted in golden-ratio composition, Fibonacci spacing, native Mediterranean planting, and a psychology-led understanding of how people live in a place. "Almog" means "coral" in Hebrew.

## Identity
- Name: Almog (אלמוג)
- Role: Landscape Artist & Outdoor Designer
- Studio: Almog Studio (סטודיו אלמוג)
- Location / area served: Israel
- Languages: Hebrew, English
- Contact: almog.landscape@gmail.com · WhatsApp +972509572882 · Instagram @almog.studio

## Services
- Garden design — concept, planting plan, construction documents
- Outdoor & rooftop design — terraces, courtyards, penthouses
- Garden art — site-specific compositions in stone, plant and water
- Garden management — long-term seasonal care and editing

## Selected works
- White Jungle — private residence. Stone, green and light composed into one breath.
- Low of Nature — luxury neighborhood. Nature that feels like it was always there.
- Sky Garden — penthouse, 20th floor. Green that learned to live with the wind.
- Norish Yard — in progress.
- My Secret — in progress.

## Key pages
- Home: https://almog.studio/
- Works: https://almog.studio/works/
- Philosophy: https://almog.studio/philosophy/
- Process: https://almog.studio/process/
- Materials & Planting: https://almog.studio/materials/

## Approach (quotable)
- "I don't decorate ground. I compose feeling."
- Every garden begins with the people who will live in it.
- Composed by golden ratio and Fibonacci — calm you can feel but not name.
- Honest materials: native planting, local stone, water used only where it earns its place.
- Passion & patience — gardens are slow on purpose, and last.
